classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标区域是17针编码器连接器的针脚分配表，表内按'Pin'、'Fuction'、'COLOR'列出1至17号针脚，对应'DC+5V'、'GND'、'A'、'/A'、'B'、'/B'、'U'、'/U'、'V'、'/V'、'Z'、'/Z'、'W'、'/W'、'NC'及线色，属于反馈编码器信号接口定义。

classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域为全图左上角蓝框内的'6 Pin Power Connector'针脚表，列出'Pin'、'Function'、'COLOR'，并给出1-U-YELLOW、2-V-RED、3-W-BLACK、4-PE-YELLOW/GREEN及5、6为NC，明确属于动力电机相线和保护地的针脚接线定义。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标区域显示圆形17针连接器针位示意，标注型号'YL221ZJ'和'17 PIN'，全图相邻标题为'17 PIN Encoder Connector'，说明该接口属于编码器反馈连接器针位图。

text_annotations.correction_note: OCR read as 0; visually corresponds to the top pin number 1 in the connector layout.
OCR read only 1; visually corresponds to pin number 11, with the second digit partially captured or merged.

terminology_notes: Pin numbers are connector identifiers, not dimensional values.

dimension_records.reason: Located inside the circular connector pin layout and represents an individual pin identifier, corrected from OCR 0 based on visual context.
Clearly detected single pin identifier within the connector face.
The OCR source overlaps the visible pin identifier 11; OCR captured only one digit, so it is corrected as a connector pin number.

engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Detected usable OCR evidence for several pin identifiers in a circular 17-pin connector face view. Full connector model text and complete pin list are visible in the image but lack usable OCR source_ids in this input.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Most visible pin numbers and the bottom connector label text are not available as reliable OCR source_ids, so they are not output as final annotations.

unresolved_items.reason: Likely false OCR from connector outline or overlapping pin graphics; not a reliable engineering text label.
Likely false OCR from connector outline and nearby pin graphics; not a reliable standalone label.
Large OCR box overlaps connector graphics and multiple pin regions; not a reliable standalone label.
Large rotated OCR box overlaps connector graphics and multiple pin regions; likely structural-line noise.
Visually present, but no reliable OCR source_id is available in ocr_source_boxes; cannot output without source_ids.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框内为6针圆形连接器孔位外形图，仅显示孔位编号1至6及型号'YL2046ZJ-Y'、'6 PIN'，未在该目标框内给出针脚功能、线色或接线对应关系；结合完整图中该局部位于6 Pin Power Connector区域，最接近连接器外形/结构信息，因此归入机械尺寸类。

text_annotations.ambiguity_note: clear single-digit label inside top circle
clear single-digit label inside right circle
clear single-digit label inside left circle
clear single-digit label inside center circle
clear single-digit label inside lower-right circle
clear single-digit label inside lower-left circle

drawing_metadata.source_image_role: IMAGE 1 target crop only for text and coordinates
drawing_metadata.drawing_context_zh: 圆形6针电源连接器端面视图
drawing_metadata.unit_assumption: Millimeters may apply to the full mechanical drawing, but no dimensional unit is visible in this crop.

language_processing_rules.original_text_policy: Preserve visible source text exactly; do not infer hidden labels from context image.
language_processing_rules.unit_rule: No explicit dimensional units are visible in IMAGE 1; units are not assigned to pin labels.
language_processing_rules.terminology_rules: Use connector and pin-identification terminology for this crop; do not treat pin labels as dimensions.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_en: Six visible connector contact positions are identified by pin numbers 1 through 6.
dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: 可见连接器触点位置标注为1至6号针脚。
dimension_records.engineering_notes_en: Numbers identify electrical connector contact positions, not dimensional values.
dimension_records.engineering_notes_zh: 数字用于识别电气连接器针脚位置，不是尺寸数值。

frontend_table_records.specification: Six visible connector contact positions are identified by pin numbers 1 through 6.

audit_table_records.normalized_specification: 可见连接器触点位置标注为1至6号针脚。

mounting_interface.en: No mounting-interface dimensions are visible in the target crop.
mounting_interface.zh: 目标裁剪图中未显示安装接口尺寸。

shaft_and_key_interface.en: No shaft or keyway information is present in this connector crop.
shaft_and_key_interface.zh: 该连接器裁剪图中没有轴或键槽信息。

overall_envelope_and_clearance.en: Only the circular connector face outline is visible; no envelope dimensions are labeled.
overall_envelope_and_clearance.zh: 仅可见圆形连接器端面轮廓，未标注外形尺寸。

connector_considerations.en: The crop shows a circular six-position connector face with pins labeled 1 through 6; pin functions are not visible in IMAGE 1.
connector_considerations.zh: 裁剪图显示圆形六位置连接器端面，针脚标号为1至6；IMAGE 1中未显示针脚功能。

missing_or_unresolved_data.en: Connector model, pin assignments, dimensional size, tolerances, and units are unresolved from IMAGE 1.
missing_or_unresolved_data.zh: 根据IMAGE 1无法确定连接器型号、针脚定义、尺寸、公差和单位。

unresolved_items.issue_en: Connector model, pin function table, and '6 PIN' text are not visible in IMAGE 1 crop.
unresolved_items.issue_zh: 连接器型号、针脚功能表和“6 PIN”文字在IMAGE 1裁剪图中不可见。
unresolved_items.recommended_action_en: Use full drawing or an uncropped connector table if these fields are required.

unresolved_items.issue_en: No dimensional callouts, tolerances, units, or mounting dimensions are visible in IMAGE 1.
unresolved_items.issue_zh: IMAGE 1中未见尺寸标注、公差、单位或安装尺寸。
unresolved_items.recommended_action_en: Do not create dimensional records from image proportions.

Dimension 6 is placed between the left shoulder and start of the upper shaft feature.
Dimension 65 is aligned with the keyway feature on top of the shaft.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框为电机前端法兰/安装面结构视图，含外形轮廓、中心圆、安装孔、螺纹孔及角度标注，文本包括'Φ200±0.15'、'M8 Deep 25'、'4-φ13'、'45°'、'2-180'等机械尺寸；虽出现'6 PIN MOTOR CONNECTOR'和'17 PIN ENCODER CONNECTOR'，但仅表示连接器物理位置，没有针脚功能或接线定义。

Kept visible OCR text; overlapping line-like fragment ocr_017 is not reused.

translation_notes: Connector labels are preserved as English labels and normalized with spacing.

Top connector label identifies the motor connector and is not a dimensional value.

engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: No shaft or keyway dimensions are visible in this cropped front mounting view.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Visible outer diameter callout is Φ200±0.15.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Top labels identify a 6 PIN MOTOR CONNECTOR and a 17 PIN ENCODER CONNECTOR.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Thread quantity for M8 holes and the exact interpretation of 2-180 are not further specified in the visible OCR text.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别电机性能曲线类图纸或图表，包括扭矩-转速曲线、转速-扭矩关系、连续扭矩、峰值扭矩、间歇扭矩、额定扭矩、最大扭矩、转速范围、额定转速、最高转速、工作区间、S1/S2/S3 工作制、短时运行区、连续运行区、功率曲线、效率曲线等。典型特征是坐标轴、曲线、工作区域、转速单位 rpm/r/min、扭矩单位 Nm/N·m。
classification.reason: 目标框内为电机扭矩随转速变化的性能曲线，纵轴标注'T (N.m)'，横轴标注'n (rpm)'，包含'Intermittent'和'Continous'两条工作区曲线，并标出77、70、30.8、28等扭矩点，工程含义为间歇和连续扭矩-转速范围。

text_annotations.correction_note: Corrected spacing from OCR text T(N.m).

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框位于完整机械外形图右下角的规格附表区域，内容为电机使用环境条件，如'Temperature'、'Humidity'、'Environment'和'Installation altitude'，不包含扭矩转速曲线或连接器针脚定义；在给定类别中最接近机械图纸附属技术条件信息。
